goal: Close all outstanding branches from v3, complete the low-friction wave with a final verdict, then conditionally explore weak-window repair and medium-friction branches under strict gate discipline.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the base snapshot.
Rejected branches must not be reopened: H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility regime descriptor, not a directional signal.
Every branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted / rejected / formally-skipped) before any downstream gate unlocks.
Do not confuse a data task with a research result — feature materialization ≠ hypothesis validation.
Medium-friction wave is locked until every low-friction branch is closed and weak-window repair is completed.

slices.title: Только после этого — решение по medium-friction wave
slices.hypothesis: Decide whether to unlock medium-friction branches (B1 cross-symbol leadership, B2 model-backed IV routing) — only after all prior work is conclusively finished.
slices.objective: Decide whether to unlock medium-friction branches (B1 cross-symbol leadership, B2 model-backed IV routing) — only after all prior work is conclusively finished.
success_criteria: A clear lock or unlock decision is recorded for the medium-friction wave.
evidence_requirements: A clear lock or unlock decision is recorded for the medium-friction wave.

slices.title: Финальный отчет по v4
slices.hypothesis: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing all v4 research outcomes, decisions, and recommendations for the next cycle.
slices.objective: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing all v4 research outcomes, decisions, and recommendations for the next cycle.
success_criteria: v4_final_report is recorded with all branch verdicts, the low-friction verdict, repair verdict, and medium-friction decision.
No open branches remain without terminal status.
evidence_requirements: v4_final_report is recorded with all branch verdicts, the low-friction verdict, repair verdict, and medium-friction decision.
No open branches remain without terminal status.
